section.heading: Technology transfer
section.chapeau: In carrying out this subchapter, the Secretary shall carry out programs that—

paragraph.content: provide for the transfer of critical hydrogen and fuel cell technologies to the private sector;
accelerate wider application of those technologies in the global market;
foster the exchange of generic, nonproprietary information; and
assess technical and commercial viability of technologies relating to the production, distribution, storage, and use of hydrogen energy and fuel cells.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 109–58, title VIII, § 818, formerly § 813, Aug. 8, 2005, 119 Stat. 855; renumbered § 818, Pub. L. 117–58, div. D, title III, § 40314(1), Nov. 15, 2021, 135 Stat. 1008.)
